history.text: Sinhala Kingdom established ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Anuradhapura period appears in Sri Lanka's historical record.
Polonnaruwa period appears in Sri Lanka's historical record.
Transitional period appears in Sri Lanka's historical record.
Kandyan period appears in Sri Lanka's historical record.
British Ceylon period appears in Sri Lanka's historical record.
Sri Lanka became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
Sri Lanka became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.

worthSeeing.title: Sigiriya:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed 5th-century rock fortress with frescoes and water gardens, the eighth wonder.

worthSeeing.title: Temple of the Tooth:
worthSeeing.text: Kandy's holiest Buddhist temple housing a relic of the Buddha's tooth.

worthSeeing.title: Ella:
worthSeeing.text: Scenic highland village of tea estates, Nine Arch Bridge, and Little Adam's Peak.

planningQuestions.q: What is Sri Lanka known for?
planningQuestions.a: Sigiriya, Temple of the Tooth, Ella.

planningQuestions.q: How should I browse it here?
planningQuestions.a: Start with the facts, jump to linked cities, then check events and topics.
